programme.title: Jackass Forever
programme.desc: Raucous comedy with Johnny Knoxville, Wee Man and friends. The Jackasses reunite for more painfully real stunts. Older? Yes. Wiser? You decide.

programme.title: Scream
programme.desc: Meta-comedy horror 're-quel' with Courteney Cox. Killer Ghostface returns to shock the younger generation out of their love of 'elevated horror' with a bit of old-fashioned slashing.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: LumoTV: You, Me, Garden?
programme.desc: Clara and the team visit Raji's garden in Enfield, North London. Raji is deaf-blind, with limited vision and struggles to walk around her garden safely in its current state.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Spartacus
programme.desc: 'I'm Spartacus!' Stanley Kubrick's Oscar-winning historical epic starring Kirk Douglas as the storied slave-cum-gladiator who takes on the might of imperial Rome. With Tony Curtis.

programme.title: Sink the Bismarck!
programme.desc: Second World War drama. Kenneth More stars as the British captain charged with finding and destroying the Bismarck, Germany's largest battleship. Directed by Lewis Gilbert.

programme.title: Tooth Fairy
programme.desc: Family fantasy comedy. Dwayne Johnson stars as a tough ice hockey player who is transformed into a real-life fairy as punishment for telling a child that tooth fairies don't exist.

programme.title: Central Intelligence
programme.desc: Action-comedy with Dwayne Johnson and Kevin Hart. Two former school buddies team up to thwart a terrorist plot. But things may not be as they seem. With Amy Ryan and Jason Bateman.

programme.title: The Martian
programme.desc: Matt Damon stars in Ridley Scott's drama about an astronaut who accidentally gets left behind on Mars. Oops. How will he survive and how on earth can he get home.

programme.title: Attack the Block
programme.desc: Sci-fi horror-comedy with John Boyega. Aggressive aliens unwisely pick a tough London estate as the beachhead for their invasion. But the locals are no pushovers..

programme.title: Monster Hunter
programme.desc: Paul WS Anderson's sci-fi action starring Milla Jovovich, based on the game of the same name. A US Army Ranger must fight her way out of a parallel world full of monsters.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Broken Lance
programme.desc: Western. A strict rancher (Spencer Tracy) treats his sons (Robert Wagner, Richard Widmark, Earl Holliman and Hugh O'Brian) as little more than employees, with fatal consequences.

programme.title: The Bedford Incident
programme.desc: Thriller. Sidney Poitier plays a photojournalist aboard a destroyer whose commander's obsessive hunt for a Soviet sub could plunge the world into nuclear war.

programme.title: Hell and High Water
programme.desc: Cold War thriller. Richard Widmark stars as the leader of a submarine expedition, sent to the frozen depths of Alaska to thwart the Chinese communists' plans to start WWIII.

programme.title: Buchanan Rides Alone
programme.desc: Western. Randolph Scott stars as a drifter who arrives in a small border town and tangles with a group of villains after helping a wealthy young Mexican, played by Manuel Rojas.

programme.title: The Monuments Men
programme.desc: George Clooney's fact-based World War II comedy-drama starring Matt Damon. Art experts form a unit to stop the Nazis stealing or destroying important cultural artefacts.

programme.title: Kingsman: The Golden Circle
programme.desc: Taron Egerton returns as the newest recruit to the stylish secret agency Kingsman for more ass-kicking comedy action. A star-studded cast includes Julianne Moore and Elton John.

programme.title: Polite Society
programme.desc: Nida Manzoor's kick-ass martial-arts anti-romcom stars Priya Kansara as a college student and wannabe stuntwoman who wants to save her older sister from an undesirable marriage.

programme.title: Our Ladies
programme.desc: Raucous teen comedy. A group of Catholic school girls hit Edinburgh for a choir competition, but they're more interested in debauchery than singing.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.
